Submagic Review | Is this The best Short Form Content Editing Tool?
Try out Submagic 👉  https://bit.ly/42bZN1s (use 'dankieft90' for a discount)

In this video I take a closer look at Submagic. I give you a complete Submagic review based on my experience as a short form content agency owner and as a creator. I'll be discussing if this tool is worth your money and how you can use it. 

Submagic is an AI caption tool that lets you create alex hormozi captions on your youtube shorts. It is a great short to quickly edit your videos using AI.

If you want to try out submagic for yourself after watching this video then use my Submagic promo code which is 'Dankieft90'. This will give you a 10% discount while it also supports the channel.
